figures.caption: Figure 4 Database distribution statistics of DD-03B. A) Label distribution of koff database: system which needs manual modelling; Shallow pocket: system which the ligand is located outside the protein surface; Short pathway: system with NEB length < 5.0 Å; Single pathway: system with only one pathway; Multiple pathway: system with more than one pathway. B) Definition of Explicit pathway(3GJD). C) Distribution between primary dissociation pathway length and pocket volume for 15,540 systems. D) Definition of Open pocket(1AVN). E) Definition of Entropy pocket(1TKA).

Figure 2 Overview of DD-03B. Blue arrow: Data processing. Blue square: core MD trajectory dataset. Red arrow: AI model training. Red square: core AI model training framework. Purple arrow: AI model fitting. Purple square: AI generative trajectory.
Table 1. Comparison of Dissociation Dynamics Database.
Figure 1 Protein-ligand complex distribution of the dataset.
Figure 3 Overview of DD-03B website. (A) Homepage of DD-03B, (B) Search by pdbid and (C) 3D viewer.
